name: resonate-vscode
description: A quiet verse for the moment you're in, surfaced natively inside your editor.

commands.title: Resonate: A verse for this moment

resonate.engineUrl.description: URL of the local Resonate engine server (python scripts/serve.py).

resonate.translation.description: Bible translation to request from the engine.

resonate.cadenceMinutes.description: Auto-surface a verse after this many minutes of focused work (0 = manual only).

resonate.enabled.description: Enable automatic surfacing in the status bar.
